note: CEO-OWNED, READ-ONLY to all improvement code. Bands flagged "placeholder": true are starting points to be REPLACED by reference-derived values in step 1 of the path (Vera the Reference Analyst). The METHODS, ownership, types, comparators and roll-up structure are the stable part; the NUMBERS are tunable. The improver (atlas/eval/loop.py) imports this file and has no write path to it.

G1.name: Pacing & rhythm
G1.captures: cut rhythm, scene length, speech cadence, pauses

G2.name: Editorial quality
G2.captures: hook, one-point clarity, arc, density, CTA

G3.name: Visual craft
G3.captures: palette, layout variety, effect discipline, type

G4.name: Asset relevance
G4.captures: visuals match narration; quality; placeholder rate

G6.name: AV coherence
G6.captures: visual boundaries align to narration; transition feel

floor.name: Technical integrity
floor.note: Pass/fail floor, NOT a weighted term. Any hard floor failure means the run has no quality score (consistent with how a fact-check block can't be averaged away).

script:hook_strength.note: preference rate vs reference-hook pool, ensembled N>=5

script:runtime_fit.note: est_runtime_sec (SHORT-format standard; plan-proxy for render:final_runtime; LONG profile [300,480] future)

script:words_per_scene.note: value=mean; detail flags any scene >45 or <8

script:one_point_adherence.note: structural: fraction of scenes with exactly one point

script:claim_support_ratio.note: fraction of claims[] with a source_ref

style:type_in_system.note: declared fonts within allowed set (phase-1: presence check)

style:motion_budget_sane.note: declared motion budget present and within bounds

style:palette_distance.note: recorded only in phase 1 (no reference-palette centroid yet)

storyboard:layout_variety.note: normalized Shannon entropy; detail.max_share must be <=0.60

storyboard:effect_discipline.note: EXACTLY ONE highlighter-FFD000 across the whole video

storyboard:shot_specificity.note: fraction of shots with concrete asset_ref/content

storyboard:signature_beat_placement.note: signature_beat present and not first or last scene

assets:placeholder_rate.note: fraction of assets with status placeholder

assets:clearance_rate.note: legal floor: fraction of assets that are not flagged as unclearable

assets:min_resolution.note: value = smallest short-side (min(w,h)) across downloaded raster assets; >=720

narration:speech_cadence.note: overall wpm; detail flags per-scene >185 or <110

narration:pause_structure.note: mean inter-scene pause (0.0 floor tolerant of back-to-back TTS)

narration:scene_timing_fit.note: value = max |narrated scene dur - script duration_est_sec|

narration:total_duration_fit.note: total_duration_sec target (SHORT-format standard; LONG profile [300,480] is a future CEO addition)

compose:auto_gate_first_pass.note: gated_ok / total scenes; required 1.0 to ship

compose:motion_energy.note: CEO middle-ground (2026-06-23): nudge motion up from our ~1.0 toward references (4-14) without chasing stock-footage levels; ceiling 18 < refs-max-with-headroom. mean |delta-luma| @4fps

compose:cut_rhythm.note: value=median shot duration; detail flags shots <1.5 or >12s

compose:layout_integrity.note: overflow/clipping integrity flags; must be zero

compose:av_sync.note: fraction of scenes whose visual boundary is within 0.25s of the narration segment boundary

audiomix:integrated_loudness.note: -14 LUFS +/- 1.0 (broadcast delivery standard, confirmed step-1: references are noise, keep the standard)

render:overall_polish.note: pairwise vs reference videos (phase-1: textual digest proxy), ensembled, CEO-anchored

render:final_loudness.note: end-to-end backstop on the muxed video (delivery standard, confirmed step-1)

render:final_runtime.note: SHORT-format standard (current testing). LONG format (~5-8 min) = a future profile [300,480] the CEO adds when long-form testing begins.

render:caption_sync.note: only measured if whisper word-timing present; else skipped

hook_strength.note: PLACEHOLDER reference-hook pool. Replace with real reference-video hooks in step 1.
references: What if everything you've been told about this was backwards? Here's the part nobody mentions.
There's a hidden reason this keeps happening — and once you see it, you can't unsee it.
Most people get this completely wrong. The truth is stranger, and simpler, than you think.
This one decision quietly shapes everything downstream. Let me show you exactly how.

overall_polish.note: PLACEHOLDER reference digests (textual proxy for finished-video comparison in phase 1).
references: A tight 70-second explainer: a punchy hook, one clear idea per scene, restrained motion, a single signature highlight beat, clean typography, audio mixed to broadcast loudness with the music ducked under a confident voiceover, and a crisp call to action.

ceo_anchor.note: When present, holds CEO pairwise labels used to re-anchor the judged ensemble each cycle. Stubbed in phase 1 (the file is optional; absence means 'not yet anchored').
